summary: Frontend testing completed for Tenuta Leone website final corrections. All 5 requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Gallery placeholder images (gallery_1_1.jpg, gallery_1_2.jpg, gallery_1_3.jpg) are very small (2-3KB) and show dimension placeholders instead of actual photos - this is an asset file issue, not code

passed_tests: ✓ Slider AUTOPLAY working - moves automatically every 3 seconds (transform changed from matrix(1,0,0,1,0,0) to matrix(1,0,0,1,-370,0) after 4.5s)
✓ Ludoteca icon using custom /img/icon/ludoteca.svg puzzle icon (puzzle piece with inner circles)
✓ Awards badge 'matrimonio.com Wedding Awards 2025' visible in About section with correct colors (no brightness filter)
✓ No demo logos found on homepage (Luxurious, Palm Tree, Boutique, The Oasis all removed)
✓ Sala gallery shows 4 items with data-testid attributes (gallery-item-0 to gallery-item-3)
✓ Lightbox opens correctly when clicking gallery items
action_items: OPTIONAL: Replace gallery placeholder images (gallery_1_1.jpg, gallery_1_2.jpg, gallery_1_3.jpg, etc.) with actual high-resolution photos if available
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified working: 1) Slider autoplay with 3s delay ✓ 2) Ludoteca puzzle icon ✓ 3) Wedding Awards 2025 badge visible ✓ 4) No demo logos ✓ 5) Gallery with 4 photos ✓. Gallery images are placeholder files (2-3KB) - may need real photos.
